tier: Tier 7.4e - Cost-Aware Policy/Action Held-Out Scoring Preflight
claim: Tier 7.4e materialized the locked Tier 7.4d held-out scoring preflight for v2.4. It verifies NAB and C-MAPSS source/preflight artifacts, disjoint held-out splits, fixed costs, online/offline label separation, baseline and sham inventories, scoring schemas, and next-gate artifacts before any performance scoring.
caveat: Preflight/schema evidence only; not a scoring run, not public usefulness proof, not a new baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
